title: Portuguese Cemetery
tagline: Portuguese Cemetery — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Portuguese Cemetery, also known as Gora Kabristan or Kacheri Cemetery, is a cemetery located on VIP Road, Kanpur, India.
overview.description: Portuguese Cemetery, also known as Gora Kabristan or Kacheri Cemetery, is a cemetery located on VIP Road, Kanpur, India. The road used to be called Amherst Street and still houses many government offices and residential bungalows.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Green Park Stadium
topPlaces.description: Green Park Stadium is an international cricket stadium in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. It has a seating capacity of approximately 32,000.

topPlaces.name: Z Square Mall, Kanpur
topPlaces.description: Z Square Mall is a shopping mall cum entertainment complex in the Indian city of Kanpur. The mall is spread on an area of five acres in the middle of Kanpur city with 84,000 square metres of built-up area and the presence of more than 150 National & International brands.

topPlaces.name: Som Dutt Plaza
topPlaces.description: Som Dutt Plaza is a Non-AC Mall (marketing complex) situated adjacent to Naveen Market along the famous Mall Road in the city of Kanpur nagar, Uttar Pradesh. It shares the same complex with Hotel Landmark.It is popularly known for electronic gadgets.

topPlaces.name: UP Stock Exchange
topPlaces.description: UP Stock Exchange (UPSE) was a Kanpur-based stock exchange. It occupied a prominent place among the Stock Exchanges in India.

topPlaces.name: Nana Rao Park
topPlaces.description: Nana Rao Park / Company Bagh (Hindi: नाना राव पार्क / कम्पनी बाग़, कानपुर ) is a public city park in Kanpur, the industrial hub of Uttar Pradesh, India, built after Indian independence in honor of Nana Sahib. Prior to Indian Independence the location was known as Memorial Well and commemorated the massacre of British women and children during the Indian Rebellion of 1857.

topPlaces.name: British India Corporation
topPlaces.description: British India Corporation Limited (BIC) is a central public sector undertaking under the ownership of the Ministry of Textiles, Government of India. The CPSU produces textiles for use by civilians and the Indian armed forces.

topPlaces.name: Phool Bagh
topPlaces.description: Ganesh Shankar Vidyarthi Udyan / Phool Bagh (Hindi: गणेश शंकर विद्यार्थी उद्यान / फूल बाग़, कानपुर ), earlier Queen's Park, is an urban city park in Kanpur, the industrial hub of Uttar Pradesh in North India. It has been the location for many public meetings and political rallies in Kanpur from the early twentieth century.

topPlaces.name: Kanpur Sangrahalaya
topPlaces.description: Kanpur Sangrahalaya (Hindi: कानपुर पुरातत्व संग्रहालय), also known as Kanpur Museum, is the official museum in Kanpur, the industrial hub of Uttar Pradesh, India. It was built by the British as King Edward Memorial Hall in honour of Edward VII. It is a storehouse of artifacts and exhibits that tell the story of the events and people who have influenced the making of Kanpur city, and tell many interesting details about the historical past of the city.

It has been the location for many public meetings and political rallies in Kanpur from the early twentieth century.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Portuguese Cemetery?
faq.a: The best time to visit Portuguese Cemetery is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Portuguese Cemetery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (4 km) and the nearest railway station is Kanpur Central (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Portuguese Cemetery?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Portuguese Cemetery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Portuguese Cemetery?
faq.a: Stays in Portuguese Cemetery start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Portuguese Cemetery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Green Park Stadium, Z Square Mall, Kanpur, Som Dutt Plaza, UP Stock Exchange, Nana Rao Park.
